chapter_goal: Make the five Platonic solids inspectable through constructions, planar drawings, Euler counts, radii/angle formulas, and reciprocal polyhedra.
concept_inventory: right regular pyramids, prisms, and antiprisms
perspective drawings, nets, and Schlegel diagrams as different records of one incidence structure
Euler formula V - E + F = 2 and the two edge-counting relations qV = 2E = pF
circumradius, midradius, inradius, central angle, and dihedral angle of {p,q}

library_routing.why: interactive rotation exposes face adjacency and dual placement
mesh topology checks guard the hand-built coordinates
Euler's formula is a graph/map invariant
exact formulas plus numeric residuals catch algebra mistakes
durable labeled PNGs are best for planar proof scaffolds

source_span_read.source_map_note: AGENTS.md gives pdf_page = printed_page + 18 for body pages.
